creator: mzs_47@yahoo.co.in
text:
I installed tilda using pkg on FreeBSD 10.1 RELEASE. However, it crashes displaying "Segmentation fault (core dumped)"

I tried installing tilda from the ports and I got the same error.

Tilda version: 0.9.6
FreeBSD: FreeBSD freebsd10-64bit 10.1-RELEASE FreeBSD 10.1-RELEASE #0 r274401
